evals.prompt: I need generate CSR for api.internal.example with SANs api.internal.example and 10.0.0.10.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-csr skill for this certificate csr request and produce the documented result for api.internal.example with SANs api.internal.example and 10.0.0.10.
expectations: Selects certificate-csr for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_generate_csr.
Keeps the response focused on generating a Certificate Signing Request (CSR) for submitting to a Certificate Authority.

evals.prompt: Create a CSR for api.internal.example with SANs api.internal.example and 10.0.0.10.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-csr skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-csr instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
